display_text: Smoke of Deceit, Cost: 50: Grants temporary invisibility and movement speed bonus to the user and nearby allies, providing immunity to True Sight. Essential for setting up ganks and moving undetected across the map without being revealed by detection. Breaking proximity to enemy heroes or towers removes the effect. Stats: CD: 1s, Duration: 45s, Charges: 1.

display_text: Smoke of Deceit, Cost: 50: Critical early-game item for supports and gankers to coordinate surprise attacks and rotations without being seen on the enemy minimap, establishing map control and creating pickoff opportunities. The shared movement speed buff facilitates quick group movements. Stats: Charges: 1, MS Bonus: 15%, Radius: 1200.

display_text: Smoke of Deceit, Cost: 50: Use to secure Roshan attempts or to bypass enemy vision when grouped for a high-ground siege. Also effective for escaping dangerous areas by breaking line of sight and gaining invisibility. Since it's immune to True Sight, it counters enemy detection efforts like Sentry Wards or Gem. Stats: Duration: 45s, Secondary Radius: 300.
